//: Local config for the demo only. The example is intentionally OUTSIDE the root tsconfig's `include` (just `src`), because browser code needs the DOM lib the backend config omits, so the root `bun run typecheck` never sees this folder. This config extends the root (inheriting its `@`-path aliases so the SDK's type imports resolve) and only adds the DOM libs; run `bun x tsc -p example-client` to type-check the demo on its own.
